description: Resource for connecting to Ab Initio EME REST API.

eme_url_env_var.label: Eme Url Env Var
eme_url_env_var.description: Env var with Ab Initio EME base URL

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var with Ab Initio EME username

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var with Ab Initio EME password

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key of an AbInitioResource. When set, env var fields are ignored.

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout Seconds
timeout_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait for job completion

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog, e.g. {"domain": "finance"}.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog (e.g. snowflake, python). Auto-inferred from component name if empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays 9am).

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on (e.g. [
